methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $40M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $700M - $2.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: KoBold Metals
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $2B+

private.name: Electric Hydrogen
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $1B+

private.name: Amogy
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $700M

data.narrative:
Forge Nano is a Series C climate and energy company that has raised $40M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of 3 same-sector, same-stage private companies (KoBold Metals at $2.0B, Electric Hydrogen at $1.0B, and Amogy at $700M), supplemented by a broader universe of 9 private and 1 public comparable.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression modeling uses the company's $40M total raised as a proxy baseline and applies a 1.7x step-up multiplier typical of Series C progression, implying a valuation of $68M. Peer-median analysis across the three same-stage, same-sector comparables yields a median valuation of $1.0B, with a range from $700M (Amogy) to $2.0B (KoBold Metals). The divergence between these methods reflects substantial heterogeneity within the climate-tech cohort at Series C.

The triangulated valuation range spans $58M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $534M. This wide band reflects material uncertainty around Forge Nano's position relative to peers—specifically, whether the company more closely resembles early-stage climate infrastructure plays or proven, venture-scale platforms approaching growth exit stages. Resolution of this positioning, combined with visibility into unit economics and near-term revenue trajectory, will be critical to narrowing the range.
